violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. Observed an employee with glove on cleaning out the handsink as there was food debris would not let water go down. Employee then proceeded to go over to the line of food with out changing gloves and washing hands.

Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Raw animal food was not properly separated from raw or cooked ready-to-eat food. Observed raw eggs above cucumbers in the single door cooler.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. Observed green peppers in the walk in cooler not date marked.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of food contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Observed a rock/stone bowl that they are using for fajitas that is not smooth, easily cleanable surface.--Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Observed aluminum foil on the shelves and the back of the stove at the time of inspection.

General equipment and utensils - Use limitations of certain materials. — --Material of food contact equipment/utensil is not approved for use by food service code. Observed cooked rice being stored in grocery bags in the walk in cooler at time of inspection

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. Observed inside of cooler with a lot of food debris and the inside of microwave with hard food debris.
Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided. No chlorine test strips at time of inspection.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. Observed a case of individual straws being stored on the floor at time of inspection.

Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not kept clean or maintained. Observed food debris and a fork in the handsink at time of inspection.--Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. Observed a hose coming from the ceiling and then goes into handsink. There is a leak on the roof.
Control of insects, rodents, and other pests. — --Insect electrocution or trapping device was installed in an inappropriate location. Observed fly strips hanging from the ceiling in the kitchen.
Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Food boxes on floor in freezer.
Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Raw animal food was not properly separated from raw or cooked ready-to-eat food. Raw chicken was stored above cheese and beef.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. Cup with handle was laying down in rice. Not stored handle up.
Cooking potentially hazardous food. — --Raw animal food or foods containing raw animal food was not heated to the minimum requirements for time and temperature. Beef was in holding at 139 F.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. Several different raw meat in walk in cooler removed from original package was not date marked.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Food contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in good repair or sound condition. Cutting board contain deep cuts, chips and missing pieces was not easily cleaned.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavator was not kept clean or maintained.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors contained a lot of food debris. Walls need cleaning.
Clean dry location, protected (1 pt deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Prevented, separated, segregated (5 pts deducted)
Storage, properly handled (1 pt deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (2 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Prevented, separated, segregated (5 pts deducted)
Storage, properly handled (1 pt deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
